items.title: v2.1.215
items.summary:
What's changed

items.title: v2.1.214
items.summary:
What's changed

  • Fixed single-segment dir/** allow rules like Edit(src/**) auto-approving writes to nested dir/ directories anywhere in the tree

items.title: v2.1.212
items.summary:
What's changed

  • /fork now copies your conversation into a new background session (its own row in claude agents) while you keep working; the in-session subage

items.title: v2.1.211
items.summary:
What's changed

  • Added --forward-subagent-text flag and CLAUDE_CODE_FORWARD_SUBAGENT_TEXT environment variable to include subagent text and thinking in stream

items.title: v2.1.210
items.summary:
What's changed

  • Added a live elapsed-time counter to the collapsed tool summary line so long-running tool calls visibly tick instead of looking stuck
  • Added a startup warning

items.summary:
Plenty of AI tools claim to be built for finance; Microsoft 365 Copilot in Excel is proving it in practice.

items.title: Copilot Cowork is now generally available
items.summary:
Cowork is the fastest growing feature in the history of our Frontier program, and Cowork has among the highest user satisfaction of any Copilot or agent experience we have shipped.

items.summary:
